title: Shadow Bow and Arrow
description: Make the arrows as back as a shadow
body:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Shadow Bow Comming soon!!

</details>


## The Void-Stitch Arrow: Piercing the Veil

Turn every shot into a silent strike from the beyond. This pack replaces the standard arrow with the **Shadow Arrow**, a projectile forged from concentrated darkness and fletched with the very essence of the void.

---
![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c5bd8d2f73cdf8a2718c2bb5cac8d8b0cca4c8b_0.webp)
### The Lore: The Piercing Silence
As **Null** watched the Soulless Totems and Umbral Aegis take shape, he realized the set was incomplete. He required a way to strike from the shadows before they could be seen. 

He gathered the charcoal remains of arrows shattered by the **Wither's** explosions and dipped them into a pool of pure liquid void. The wood didn't just turn black; it became weightless, slicing through the air without making a sound. It is said that these arrows don't hit their targets—they simply "delete" the space where the target used to be.

---

### Pack Features
* **Obsidian Tip:** The flint arrowhead is replaced with a jagged, matte-black point designed for maximum "void" impact.
* **Invisible Flight:** The dark color palette makes these arrows significantly harder for enemies to track mid-air, especially in low-light environments.
* **Corrupted Fletching:** The feathers are stained with a deep, charcoal grey, matching the aesthetic of a true Void-Walker.

---

### The Complete Void Set
With the **[Soulless Totem](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/soulless-totem)**, the **[Black Shield](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/black-shield)**, and now the **Shadow Arrow**, you are fully equipped with the artifacts of Null's corruption.
